specs_container: Product characteristicDescriptionBalloon coatingPaclitaxel and ureaCatheter shaft designOver-the-wire (OTW)Sterilization methodEthylene oxide (ETO)Shaft diameter5 FrCatheter effective length40, 80, and 130 cmBalloon lengths40 to 120 mmNominal balloon pressure4.0–9.0 mm — 8 atm; 10.0–12.0 mm — 6 atmRated burst pressure4.0–7.0 mm — 14 atm; 8.0–9.0 mm — 10 atm; 10.0 mm — 9 atm; 12.0 mm — 9 atmBalloon diameters4.0 to 12.0 mmIntroducer sheath compatibility4.0 mm — 5 Fr; 5.0–6.0 mm — 6 Fr; 7.0–10 mm — 7 Fr; 12.0 mm — 9 FrBalloon fold configuration4.0 mm 3 folds; 5 — 12 mm 6 foldsPaclitaxel drug dose3.5 μg/mm2Guidewire compatibility0.035"
